proverb_en: Better once in heaven than ten times at the gate.

notes: A dry crust eaten in peace is better than a steak eaten in anxiety.

proverb_en: Creaking carts last the longest.
notes: means that people or objects that seem frail sickly or faulty often outlast those that appear stronger
